findings.title: Marketing independent verification still fail — sole blocker to whole-stack green
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification fails closed. Stale since 2026-06-02 (~64.8h). Distribution channels blocked (Reddit, Apollo), primary repo flat, measurement hold active.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption still missing. No shipped replacement distribution path recorded.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, ship working distribution path, and rerun independent verification.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology clean — 21 enabled, 0 disabled, 19 ok
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows coherent runtime topology with no disabled live jobs. 19 ok, 0 running, 2 error (both non-architecture).
findings.root_cause: Runtime topology is healthy and reflects intended architecture.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain direct cron inspection as source of truth.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path green — ok=true, no errors
findings.mechanism: Agent architecture verifier ok=true, no errors. Independent verifier qualified_pass=true. Architecture-owned gates coherent; remaining blocker correctly externalized.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue rerunning independent verification after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Docs quality stack green and stable
findings.mechanism: Docs verifier pass, checker DOCS_QUALITY_OK, editorial DOCS_EDITORIAL_OK, agentic pass. recent_failures=36, consecutive_passes_since_last_fail=45. Independently verified pass.
findings.root_cause: Docs loop healthy with sustained stability.

findings.title: Loop 'pypi-auto-unblocker' has no self-improvement mandate in registry
findings.mechanism: Job exists in live cron topology (enabled, ok) but is not registered in self_improvement_loops.json. Status is 'ok' but no self-improvement contract exists.
findings.root_cause: Loop created without self-improvement mandate or independent verification requirement.
findings.recommended_fix: Register in self_improvement_loops.json with checker/runner/verifier scripts, or retire if unused.

findings.title: Loop 'internal-linking-watchdog' has no self-improvement mandate and a delivery error
findings.mechanism: Job exists with last_error status (Matrix delivery target error in failureAlert). Not registered in self_improvement_loops.json. Two failures: architectural (no mandate) + operational (delivery broken). Root cause: failureAlert delivery config missing Matrix 'to' field.
findings.root_cause: Loop created without self-improvement mandate and has unhealed delivery failure (missing 'to' in failureAlert delivery config).
evidence_refs: openclaw cron list --json (job: cff4b37d-dc69-43e5-bb05-91d5ad10a270, last_error + delivery config)
findings.recommended_fix: Fix failureAlert delivery target (add 'to' field), then register in self_improvement_loops.json or retire.

findings.mechanism: Previously the architecture verifier artifact_contract_fail incident. Escalation actions recorded as resolved. Architecture verifier now passes fresh. Marked resolved at 2026-06-05T05:33 UTC.
findings.root_cause: Historical incident from verifier contract gap that has been repaired.
findings.recommended_fix: Monitor for 1 more watchdog run before closing ticket. Verifier has been clean for 2 consecutive runs.

findings.title: Incident agent_architecture_json::artifact_contract_fail — 43 repeats, resolved
findings.mechanism: Previously audit metadata disagreed with live cron topology (job count mismatches). Resolved at 2026-06-04T13:28 UTC. Current audit metadata matches live topology (21/21).
findings.root_cause: Stale expected-job-count expectations from topology changes.

findings.title: Incident agent_architecture_verifier_runtime::artifact_contract_fail — 230 repeats, resolved
findings.mechanism: Verifier runtime freshness gate incident. Resolved at 2026-06-05T05:45 UTC. Independent verification now passes with current runtime evidence.
findings.root_cause: Independent verification artifact predated runtime evidence; repaired by cascaded re-verification.
findings.recommended_fix: Incident closed. Fresh verification chain in place.
